name: telegram-checker-all-in-one
description: Cleaner + Checker + Auto Queue in one web project

scripts.health: node -e "require('dotenv').config({override:true}); const port=process.env.PORT||3000; fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:${port}/api/health`).then(async r=>{const body=await r.text(); if(!r.ok) throw new Error(body); console.log(body);}).catch(e=>{console.error(e.message); process.exit(1);})"
